context: Theories of pathogenesis: reflux of bile / pancreatic enzymes / duodenal succus (a)  terminal duct segment shared by common bile duct and pancreatic duct (b)  obstruction at papilla of Vater from inflammatory stenosis, edema / spasm of sphincter of Oddi, tumor, periduodenal diverticulum (c)  incompetent sphincter of Oddi
